Class StatementService

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.statement.StatementService
public class StatementService extends Object
A utility class that handles and organises data required for generating monthly statements.

  • Nested Class Summary

    static final record 
    StatementService.StatementInfo
    A record class that holds the required data for generating a monthly statement.

      public StatementService()

  • Method Details

    • trackMonthlyDebt

      public static void trackMonthlyDebt(int custID, YearMonth month, float balance)
      Records the amount of debt accrued by a customer in a specific month. It is used by DebtAutomationService at the end of each month.
      Parameters:
      custID - The ID of the customer.
      month - The month of the billing cycle.
      balance - The balance due for the customer.

    • deleteMonthData

      public static void deleteMonthData(int custID, YearMonth month)
      When a debt gets absolved before the end of the month, there is no need for a statement, so delete the debt tracking data.
      Parameters:
      custID - The ID of the customer.
      month - The month of the billing cycle.

    • getEligibleCustomers

      public static ArrayList<Customer> getEligibleCustomers()
      Get eligible customers for generating statements.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Customer objects.

    • buildStatementData

      public static StatementService.StatementInfo buildStatementData(int custID, YearMonth month)
      A factory method that builds a StatementService.StatementInfo object using data across several tables. First it gets monthly balance data for the customer, then it gets the products bought with credit during the billing cycle. Then, using convertSaleDataToStatementFormat(Map) it flattens the sales data and converts into the StatementItems bean format. This allows the statement to have a flat list of all items purchased with credit during the billing cycle and tie them to a single customer. As a customer could've purchased multiple items with credit during the billing cycle, we collect it as an ArrayList of StatementItems. Finally, all the data collected is packaged into a StatementService.StatementInfo object and returned.
      Parameters:
      custID - The ID of the customer.
      month - The month of the billing cycle.
      Returns:
      A StatementService.StatementInfo object containing the required data for generating a monthly statement.
